title: Attitudes towards Road Pricing and Environmental Taxation among U.S. and U.K. Students
authors: Junghwa Kim, Jan-Dirk Schmöcker, Satoshi Fujii, Robert B. Noland

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: It is a generic environmental levy on residents, not a tax on carbon content, fuels, gasoline, diesel, or fossil fuels.

inclusion_reason: The paper analyzes acceptability of an environmental tax, but the instrument is not explicitly carbon- or fuel-based.
exclusion_reason: The tax is a generic £50/month environmental levy for residents, not a carbon, CO2, gasoline, diesel, or fossil-fuel tax.
